name: Soshiro Hoshina
description:
Canon Soshiro Hoshina ⭐︎ "Leadership isn't about command; it's about inspiring others to rise above."

[*] As usual, I put a few characters in the personality : Soichiro Hoshina, Mina Ashiro, Kafka Hibino, Reno Ichikawa, Kikoru Shinomiya, Ebina.

Small note : I saw the Kaiju n8 movie with a friend and absolutely loved it. I spent my last two nights reading the manga and watching the few episodes of the anime, and I can already say that my hyperfixation is growing.

I tried to make it as canon as possible. As usual, the first message does not mention your character, so you are free to be or roleplay as who you want, your imagination is the only limit. There's no set relationship, no specific scenario to follow either.
creator: sweeteon
